## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --features full`
- [ ] `./verify.sh` if the change touches shared infrastructure

## Notes
- Feature flags affected:
- Docs/examples updated:
- Screenshots or terminal output for UI/API changes:
- Linked issue or follow-up:
